title: Pack of 50 Clear Plastic Half Pint Glasses – 330ml Disposable Drinking Cups – Recyclable Plastic Tumblers for Parties, Events, BBQs, Catering, Weddings, Outdoor & Everyday Use
features: 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞: These plastic beer glasses offer ultimate convenience, as they are disposable, eliminating the need for washing or storage after use.
𝐂𝐄 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐝: Our full pint disposable plastic beer glasses are CE marked, ensuring compliance with UK regulations for safe and legal use in bars, pubs, and events.
𝐇𝐚𝐥𝐟 𝐏𝐢𝐧𝐭 𝐂𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲: With a generous capacity of a full pint (approximately 330 ml), these glasses allow you to serve your favorite beers or other beverages in the perfect portion size.

𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭-𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐲: Whether you're hosting a party, outdoor gathering, wedding, or any other event, our full pint disposable plastic beer glasses are the ideal choice, ensuring hassle-free service and enjoyment for you and your guests.

𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡-𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥: Crafted from durable and sturdy BPA free plastic, these CE marked beer glasses are designed to withstand the rigors of any event while maintaining their crystal-clear appearance.
description: "Introducing AVLASH Pack of 50 - Clear Plastic Full Pint Glasses 330 ML, the ultimate solution for all your beverage needs at any event! These disposable plastic pint glasses are designed to offer the best quality and convenience, ensuring a hassle-free and enjoyable drinking experience. Crafted with care, each AVLASH pint glass is made from high-quality, crystal-clear plastic that mimics the appearance of traditional glassware. With a generous capacity of 660 ML, these glasses are perfectly sized to hold a full pint of your favorite beer or any other refreshing beverage of your choice. Whether you're hosting a lively party, planning a casual get-together, or organizing a large-scale event, these clear plastic pint glasses are the ideal choice. Their durable construction ensures that they won't easily crack or break. Simply enjoy your drink, and when you're done, effortlessly dispose of the glasses without any worry about washing or storage.
